2606.09553.title: OpenBibleTTS: Large-Scale Speech Resources and TTS Models for Low-Resource Languages
2606.09553.paper_summary: Recent advances in neural text-to-speech (TTS) and multilingual speech generation have substantially improved synthetic speech quality, yet these gains remain unevenly distributed across the world's languages. Existing models are still dominated by a small set of high-resource languages, while many studies of low-resource TTS are simulated on artificially downsampled high-resource corpora that do not reflect the orthographic variation and limited phonetic coverage encountered in genuinely underrepresented settings. As such, we introduce OpenBibleTTS, which is a large-scale benchmark for low-resource speech synthesis spanning 37 underrepresented languages. Moreover, a systematic comparison of various TTS architectures and large-scale speech generation models is conducted across in-domain Biblical text and out-of-domain material. Results show that no single system dominates across languages and metrics: Gemini-TTS achieves the highest listener ratings on most evaluated languages, but monolingual EveryVoice models trained on OpenBibleTTS remain strongest for intelligibility and are preferred in several African languages, while open from-scratch systems degrade sharply on out-of-domain text, revealing a persistent gap between broad multilingual coverage and reliable synthesis quality in underserved linguistic communities. We complement automatic evaluation with subjective human judgments, and open-source all processed datasets, alignments, and trained models to support future low-resource TTS research.
2606.09553.paper_summary_zh: 最近在神經文本轉語音（TTS）和多語言語音生成方面的進展顯著提高了合成語音的質量，但這些增益在世界語言中仍然分佈不均。現有模型仍然由一小部分高資源語言主導，而許多低資源TTS的研究則是在人工下採樣的高資源語料庫上進行的，這些語料庫並未反映在真正代表性不足的環境中所遇到的正字法變異和有限的語音覆蓋。因此，我們介紹了OpenBibleTTS，這是一個涵蓋37種代表性不足語言的大規模低資源語音合成基準。此外，對各種TTS架構和大規模語音生成模型在領域內的聖經文本和領域外材料進行了系統比較。結果顯示，沒有單一系統在語言和指標上佔據主導地位：Gemini-TTS在大多數評估語言中獲得了最高的聽眾評分，但在OpenBibleTTS上訓練的單語言EveryVoice模型在可理解性方面仍然最強，並且在幾種非洲語言中更受偏愛，而從零開始的開放系統在領域外文本上的表現急劇下降，揭示了在服務不足的語言社區中，廣泛的多語言覆蓋與可靠的合成質量之間的持續差距。我們用主觀的人類評價補充自動評估，並開源所有處理過的數據集、對齊和訓練模型，以支持未來的低資源TTS研究。
2606.09553.author: David Guzmán et.al.
2606.09553.authors: David Guzmán, Luel Hagos Beyene, Jesujoba Oluwadara Alabi, Yejin Jeon, Dietrich Klakow, David Ifeoluwa Adelani
